data.name: AccountLocked
data.value: Account is locked. Please try again later.

data.name: PasswordExpired
data.value: Password expired. Please reset it before signing in again.

data.name: TokenExpired
data.value: Access token expired. Please sign in again.

data.name: NotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: RateLimited
data.value: Too many requests. Please try again later.

data.name: InternalError
data.value: An internal server error occurred. Please contact the administrator.

data.name: FileTooLarge
data.value: File size exceeds the allowed limit.

data.name: LowCodeAppKeyFormatInvalid
data.value: App key must start with a letter and can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.

data.name: DynamicAlterAtLeastOneChange
data.value: At least one schema change is required.

data.name: DynamicAlterUpdateNotSupported
data.value: Updating existing fields is not supported in this version.

data.name: DynamicAlterRemoveNotSupported
data.value: Removing fields is not supported in this version.

data.name: DynamicAlterFieldNameInvalid
data.value: Invalid field name for added fields.

data.name: DynamicAlterFieldNameDuplicated
data.value: Added field names must be unique.

data.name: ConfirmPasswordMismatch
data.value: The two passwords do not match.

data.name: PasswordMinLength
data.value: Password must be at least {0} characters long.

data.name: PasswordRequireUppercase
data.value: Password must contain an uppercase letter.

data.name: PasswordRequireLowercase
data.value: Password must contain a lowercase letter.

data.name: PasswordRequireNonAlphanumeric
data.value: Password must contain a non-alphanumeric character.

data.name: DynamicTableDbTypeInvalid
data.value: The database type is not supported.

data.name: DynamicTableFieldsCountInvalid
data.value: The number of fields must be between 1 and 200.

data.name: DynamicTableFieldTypeInvalid
data.value: The field type is not supported.

data.name: DynamicTableFieldLengthInvalid
data.value: The field length or precision is invalid.

data.name: DynamicTableFieldValidationInvalid
data.value: The field validation rule is invalid.

data.name: DynamicTablePrimaryKeyRequired
data.value: Exactly one primary key field is required.

data.name: DynamicTablePrimaryKeyTypeInvalid
data.value: The primary key must use Int or Long.

data.name: DynamicTableAutoIncrementInvalid
data.value: Auto-increment fields must be primary keys of type Int or Long.

data.name: LowCodeDataSourceIdPositive
data.value: DataSourceId must be a positive number.

data.name: LowCodeImportAppKeyRequired
data.value: The app key in the import package is required.

data.name: LowCodeImportAppKeyMaxLength
data.value: The app key in the import package cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.name: LowCodeImportAppKeyInvalid
data.value: The app key in the import package is invalid.

data.name: LowCodeImportNameRequired
data.value: The app name in the import package is required.

data.name: LowCodeImportNameMaxLength
data.value: The app name in the import package cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.name: LowCodeImportConflictStrategyInvalid
data.value: The conflict strategy must be Rename, Overwrite, or Skip.

data.name: LowCodeImportKeySuffixMaxLength
data.value: The key suffix cannot exceed {0} characters.

data.name: LowCodeImportKeySuffixInvalid
data.value: The key suffix can only contain letters, digits, underscores, and hyphens.

data.name: LowCodeEntityAliasesRequired
data.value: The entity alias list is required.

data.name: LowCodeEntityAliasesCountMax
data.value: The number of entity aliases cannot exceed {0}.

data.name: FLOW_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The approval flow definition does not exist.

data.name: FLOW_NOT_PUBLISHED
data.value: The approval flow is not published.

data.name: FLOW_DEPRECATED
data.value: The approval flow has been deprecated and new instances cannot be started.

data.name: TASK_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The approval task does not exist.

data.name: INSTANCE_NOT_RUNNING
data.value: The process instance is not running.

data.name: INSTANCE_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The process instance does not exist.

data.name: COPY_RECORD_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The copy record does not exist.

data.name: COPY_RECORD_NOT_OWNER
data.value: You do not have permission to access this copy record.

data.name: INVALID_STATUS
data.value: The current status does not allow this operation.

data.name: Conflict
data.value: A data conflict occurred. Please refresh and try again.

data.name: TokenMissingTenant
data.value: Token is missing a valid tenant claim.

data.name: TokenMissingUser
data.value: Token is missing a valid user identifier.

data.name: TokenMissingSession
data.value: Token is missing a valid session identifier.

data.name: UserDisabledOrNotExist
data.value: User is disabled or does not exist.

data.name: SessionRevoked
data.value: Session has expired or been revoked.

data.name: RefreshTokenInvalid
data.value: Refresh token is invalid or expired.

data.name: AccountDisabled
data.value: Account does not exist or has been disabled.

data.name: PasswordChanged
data.value: Password has changed. Please sign in again.

data.name: MfaNotSetup
data.value: Please call the setup endpoint first to generate a secret key.

data.name: MfaAlreadyEnabled
data.value: MFA is already enabled. Please disable it before resetting.

data.name: MfaCodeInvalid
data.value: Verification code is incorrect. Please try again.

data.name: LoginFailedTooManyTimes
data.value: Too many failed login attempts. Please enter the captcha.

data.name: CaptchaExpired
data.value: Captcha is incorrect or has expired.

data.name: RegistrationDisabled
data.value: Registration is not enabled for this system.

data.name: AgentEndTimeInvalid
data.value: Agent end time must be later than the start time.

data.name: AgentForbiddenDelete
data.value: You do not have permission to delete this agent configuration.

data.name: NoPermissionMarkRead
data.value: You do not have permission to mark this task as read.

data.name: CannotApproveTask
data.value: You are not authorized to approve this task.

data.name: OnlyInitiatorCanCancel
data.value: Only the initiator can cancel the process.

data.name: OnlyInitiatorOrAdminCanSubmit
data.value: Only the initiator or an administrator can submit the draft.

data.name: TargetNodeRequired
data.value: The target node ID must be specified for this operation.

data.name: TargetAssigneeRequired
data.value: The target assignee must be specified for this operation.

data.name: NodeAlreadyExecuted
data.value: The target node has already been executed and the assignee cannot be changed.

data.name: TaskIdRequired
data.value: A task ID must be specified for this operation.

data.name: AssigneeRequired
data.value: At least one assignee must be specified for this operation.

data.name: TaskInstanceMismatch
data.value: The task does not belong to the specified process instance.

data.name: OnlyCurrentAssigneeCanAddSign
data.value: Only the current assignee can add a co-signer.

data.name: CannotDrawBack
data.value: The process has been approved and cannot be withdrawn.

data.name: OnlyInitiatorCanDrawBack
data.value: Only the initiator can withdraw the process.

data.name: TargetTaskNotFound
data.value: The target task to be removed was not found.

data.name: DelegateTaskSelf
data.value: You can only undertake tasks assigned to yourself.

data.name: CannotReturnDelegateTask
data.value: Only delegated tasks can be returned.

data.name: NoPermissionDelegate
data.value: You do not have permission to delegate this task.

data.name: FlowInstanceForbidden
data.value: You do not have permission to operate this process instance.

data.name: MenuPathExists
data.value: Menu path already exists. Please use a different path.

data.name: MenuHasChildren
data.value: This menu has child items. Please delete child items first.

data.name: RoleHasUsers
data.value: This role has assigned users. Please unbind them before deleting.

data.name: DataScopeDeptRequired
data.value: Custom data scope requires at least one department.

data.name: PermissionNotFoundPlatform
data.value: Permission not found or is not a platform-level permission.

data.name: DeptNameOrCodeExists
data.value: Department name or code already exists.

data.name: DeptHasChildren
data.value: This department has child departments and cannot be deleted directly.

data.name: DeptNotInProject
data.value: Department does not belong to the current project.

data.name: CoreTenantCannotDelete
data.value: The built-in core tenant cannot be deleted.

data.name: NoPermissionAccessConversation
data.value: You do not have permission to access this conversation.

data.name: WorkflowNotPublished
data.value: Only published workflows can be executed.

data.name: DynamicTableMigrationVersionExists
data.value: A migration version for this table already exists.

data.name: MigrationDestructiveNotConfirmed
data.value: This migration contains destructive changes. Please complete the pre-check and confirm execution first.

data.name: MigrationAlreadySucceeded
data.value: Migration has already been executed successfully and cannot be re-run.

data.name: MigrationInProgress
data.value: Migration is currently in progress. Please try again later.

data.name: MigrationTableKeyMismatch
data.value: The migration script table key does not match the target dynamic table.

data.name: IdempotencyConflict
data.value: Idempotency key conflict. Please do not submit duplicate requests.

data.name: IdempotencyInProgress
data.value: Request is being processed. Please try again later.

data.name: DatabaseCorrupted
data.value: Database corruption detected. Automatic recovery is in progress. Please retry later and check migration task progress.

data.name: AntiforgeryTokenInvalid
data.value: CSRF token is invalid. Please refresh the page and try again.

data.name: LicenseLimitExceeded
data.value: License usage limit has been exceeded.

data.name: ProjectForbidden
data.value: You do not have permission to access this project.

data.name: ApprovalTargetNodeRequired
data.value: A target node ID must be specified for the back-to-node operation.

data.name: ApprovalTransferTargetRequired
data.value: A target assignee must be specified for transfer or change-assignee operations.

data.name: ApprovalAddAssigneeRequired
data.value: At least one assignee must be specified for the add-signer operation.

data.name: ApprovalFlowIdRequired
data.value: Flow ID must be greater than 0.

data.name: ApprovalDefinitionIdRequired
data.value: Flow definition ID must be greater than 0.

data.name: ApprovalDataJsonMaxLength
data.value: Business data JSON cannot exceed 10000 characters.

data.name: ApprovalDeptIdRequired
data.value: Department ID must be greater than 0.

data.name: ApprovalLeaderUserIdRequired
data.value: User ID must be greater than 0.

data.name: SystemConfigKeyFormat
data.value: Config key may only contain letters, digits, dots, and underscores. It must start with a letter and be at most 128 characters long.

data.name: PermissionTypeInvalid
data.value: Permission type must be one of: Api, Menu, Application, Page, or Action.

data.name: DictCodeFormat
data.value: Dictionary code may only contain lowercase letters, digits, and underscores. It must start with a letter and be at most 64 characters long.

data.name: TableViewNameMaxLength
data.value: View name exceeds the maximum length.

data.name: AppMemberRequired
data.value: At least one application member must be selected.

data.name: AppRoleCodeFormat
data.value: Role code must start with a letter and may only contain letters, digits, colons, underscores, or hyphens.

data.name: DynamicRecordFieldValueTypeInvalid
data.value: Field value type is not supported.

data.name: DynamicRecordFieldValueSingle
data.value: Exactly one typed value must be provided for each field.

data.name: ModelConfigProviderTypeInvalid
data.value: ProviderType must be one of: openai, deepseek, ollama, or custom.

data.name: ModelConfigBaseUrlInvalid
data.value: BaseUrl must be a valid absolute URL.

data.name: LowCodeEnvVariablesJsonInvalid
data.value: VariablesJson must be a valid JSON object.

data.name: LowCodePageKeyFormat
data.value: Page key may only contain letters, digits, underscores, and hyphens.

data.name: DynamicTableOnlySqlite
data.value: Only SQLite is supported for dynamic table creation.

data.name: DynamicTableOnlySqliteAlter
data.value: Only SQLite is supported for dynamic table schema changes.

data.name: DynamicTableOnlySqlitePreview
data.value: Only SQLite is supported for dynamic table schema change preview.

data.name: DynamicTableNotBoundApprovalFlow
data.value: This dynamic table is not bound to an approval flow.

data.name: DynamicTablePrimaryKeyNotSupported
data.value: Adding primary key or auto-increment fields in schema changes is not supported in this version.

data.name: DynamicTableNonNullFieldRequiresDefault
data.value: A default value is required when adding a non-nullable field.

data.name: DynamicTableFieldUpdateLimitedFields
data.value: Only display name and sort order can be updated in this version.

data.name: DynamicTableFieldsEmpty
data.value: Dynamic table has no fields defined.

data.name: FieldNoEditPermission
data.value: The current role has no field edit permission.

data.name: FlowDeprecated
data.value: Flow definition is deprecated and cannot be used to start new instances.

data.name: FlowNotDraft
data.value: Only draft flow definitions can be edited.

data.name: FlowNotDraftDelete
data.value: Only draft flow definitions can be deleted.

data.name: FlowAlreadyPublished
data.value: This flow definition is already published.

data.name: FlowVersionMismatch
data.value: Version does not belong to this approval flow definition.

data.name: ApprovalTaskNotPending
data.value: Task is not in pending status.

data.name: ApprovalNoPermission
data.value: You do not have permission to approve this task.

data.name: ApprovalCopyRecordNotOwner
data.value: You do not have permission to operate this CC record.

data.name: ApprovalOnlyInitiatorCanCancel
data.value: Only the initiator can cancel the process.

data.name: ApprovalNoPermissionDelegate
data.value: You do not have permission to delegate this task.

data.name: ApprovalNoPermissionDelegate2
data.value: You do not have permission to handle this delegated task.

data.name: ApprovalNoPermissionInstance
data.value: You do not have permission to operate this process instance.

data.name: ApprovalOnlyInitiatorOrAdminSubmit
data.value: Only the initiator or an administrator can submit a draft.

data.name: LowCodeAppVersionMismatch
data.value: Version snapshot does not match the current application.

data.name: LowCodeImportPackageMissingInfo
data.value: Import package is missing application key or name.

data.name: DynamicTableAlterFailed
data.value: Failed to alter dynamic table schema.

data.name: DynamicTableRelationsUpdateFailed
data.value: Failed to update dynamic table relations.

data.name: ApprovalOpTaskIdRequired
data.value: This operation requires a task ID.

data.name: ApprovalOpAssigneeRequired
data.value: This operation requires at least one approver.

data.name: ApprovalOpTaskInstanceMismatch
data.value: The task does not belong to the specified process instance.

data.name: ApprovalOpOnlyPendingTask
data.value: Only tasks in pending status can be processed.

data.name: ApprovalOpOnlyCurrentHandler
data.value: Only the current handler can perform this operation.

data.name: ApprovalOpTargetAssigneeRequired
data.value: This operation requires a target assignee.

data.name: ApprovalOpOnlyOwnTask
data.value: You can only operate on your own tasks.

data.name: ApprovalOpTargetNodeRequired
data.value: This operation requires a target node ID.

data.name: ApprovalOpNodeAlreadyExecuted
data.value: The target node has already been executed.

data.name: ApprovalOpNoCurrentNode
data.value: The process instance has no current node.

data.name: ApprovalOpTaskNotApproved
data.value: Only approved tasks can be reverted.

data.name: ApprovalOpReclaimTaskIdRequired
data.value: You must specify the task ID to reclaim.

data.name: ApprovalOpReclaimOnlyOwnApproved
data.value: You can only reclaim tasks you have approved.

data.name: ApprovalOpRecoverOnlyEndedInstance
data.value: Only ended process instances can be recovered.

data.name: ApprovalOpFutureRemoveNodeRequired
data.value: Future-node removal requires a target node ID.

data.name: ApprovalOpFutureRemoveAssigneeRequired
data.value: Future-node removal requires assignees to remove.

data.name: ApprovalOpFutureRemoveNodeExecuted
data.value: The target node has already been executed; future-node removal is not allowed.

data.name: ApprovalTaskAlreadyClaimed
data.value: The task has already been claimed.

data.name: SnowflakeTenantIdRequired
data.value: Tenant ID is required to generate IDs.

data.name: SnowflakeAppIdRequired
data.value: Application ID is required to generate IDs.

data.name: AppPermissionCodeExists
data.value: Permission code already exists under this application.

data.name: ConversationForbidden
data.value: You are not allowed to operate this conversation.

data.name: ConversationAgentMismatch
data.value: Conversation does not match the current agent.

data.name: ConversationAccessDenied
data.value: Access to this conversation is denied.

data.name: ModelEmptyResponse
data.value: The model did not return a usable response.

data.name: ModelConfigNotFound
data.value: The specified model configuration was not found.

data.name: SystemPromptCannotModify
data.value: System prompt templates cannot be modified.

data.name: SystemPromptCannotDelete
data.value: System prompt templates cannot be deleted.

data.name: ApprovalOpRemoveAssigneeTargetTaskNotFound
data.value: Target approval task to remove was not found.

data.name: ApprovalOpUndertakePendingOnly
data.value: Only pending tasks can be undertaken.

data.name: ApprovalOpUndertakeOwnTask
data.value: You can only undertake your own tasks.

data.name: ApprovalOnlyInitiatorDrawBack
data.value: Only the initiator can withdraw the process.

data.name: ApprovalDrawBackOnlyRunning
data.value: Only running processes can be withdrawn.

data.name: ApprovalDrawBackAlreadyProgressed
data.value: The process has already been approved and cannot be withdrawn.

data.name: ApprovalOpChangeAssigneePendingOnly
data.value: Only pending tasks can change assignee.

data.name: ApprovalOpBackAnyNodeTargetRequired
data.value: Jump-back requires a target node ID.

data.name: ApprovalOpBackAnyNodePendingOnly
data.value: Jump-back can only be based on a pending task.

data.name: ApprovalOpBackAnyNodeForbidden
data.value: Only the initiator or current handler can perform jump-back.

data.name: ApprovalOperationInProgress
data.value: The operation is in progress; please do not resubmit.

data.name: ApprovalOperationRetryRequired
data.value: The last operation failed; retry with a new idempotency key.

data.name: ApprovalInstanceAlreadyRunning
data.value: The process is already running; resume is not needed.

data.name: KnowledgeBaseImportRequiresFileOrId
data.value: Please provide fileId or upload a file.

data.name: WorkflowVersionNotInWorkflow
data.value: Version not found or does not belong to this workflow.

data.name: IntegrationApiKeyInvalid
data.value: API key is invalid or not permitted.

data.name: LowCodeAppNotBoundDataSource
data.value: The application has no data source bound.

data.name: SsoProviderNotFoundOrDisabled
data.value: Provider is not found or not enabled.

data.name: SsoProviderNotFoundFormat
data.value: Provider '{0}' is not found or not enabled.

data.name: PluginPackageUploadRequired
data.value: Please upload a plugin package file.

data.name: WorkflowV2ResumeInvalidState
data.value: Resume is only allowed for failed, cancelled, or interrupted executions.

data.name: WorkflowV2NameFormat
data.value: Workflow name must start with a letter and contain only letters, digits, and underscores.

data.name: WorkflowV2NameLength
data.value: Workflow name must be at most 30 characters long.

data.name: FlowCompareTargetVersionNotFound
data.value: Target version not found; cannot compare.

data.name: AiWorkflowNodeTypeDescPlugin
data.value: Call an external plugin or API

data.name: ToolAuditQueryPlaceholder
data.value: Audit query placeholder; aggregation will be wired in a later release.

data.name: AppManifestImpactAnalysisPending
data.value: Impact analysis is under construction and will ship in a future version.
